properties.name: appearance
properties.description: Sets the input element's appearance

properties.name: autocomplete
properties.description: Hint for form autofill feature

properties.name: autofocus
properties.description: Indicates that an element should be focused on page load, or when the Dialog that it is part of is displayed

properties.name: char-count
properties.description: Use in combination with `maxlength` to display a character count

properties.name: disabled
properties.description: Whether the input element is disabled

properties.name: error-text
properties.description: The error text for the form element.

properties.name: helper-text
properties.description: The helper text for the form element.

properties.name: inputmode
properties.description: Allows a browser to display an appropriate virtual keyboard

properties.name: label
properties.description: Label of the Text Field

properties.name: list
properties.description: Value of the id attribute of the `` of autocomplete options

properties.name: maxlength
properties.description: Maximum length (number of characters) of `value`

properties.name: minlength
properties.description: Minimum length (number of characters) of `value`

properties.name: pattern
properties.description: Pattern the `value` must match to be valid

properties.name: placeholder
properties.description: Text that appears in the input element when it has no value set

properties.name: readonly
properties.description: The `value` is not editable

properties.name: required
properties.description: A value is required for the form to be submittable

properties.name: size
properties.description: Size (in chars) of the input element

properties.name: scale
properties.description: Sets the display size of the input element

properties.name: shape
properties.description: Sets the shape of the input element

properties.name: success-text
properties.description: The success text for the form element.

properties.name: type
properties.description: Type of input element

properties.name: value
properties.description: The value of the input element. When specified in the HTML, corresponds to the initial value

events.name: blur
events.description: Fires a custom 'blur' event the input loses focus

events.name: change
events.description: Fires a custom 'change' event when the `value` has changed and focus leaves the input element

events.name: focus
events.description: Fires a custom 'focus' event when the input gains focus

events.name: input
events.description: Fires a custom 'input' event immediately when the `value` has changed

slots.name: action-items
slots.description: Add postfix elements to the Text Field input element.

slots.name: helper-text
slots.description: Add rich content as the Text Field's helper text.

slots.name: leading-action-items
slots.description: Add prefix elements to the Text Field input element.

slots.name: contextual-help
slots.description: Allows you to add the [Contextual Help](/components/contextual-help/) component to be displayed next to the label.

methods.name: checkValidity
methods.description: Returns `true` if the element's `value` passes validity checks; otherwise, returns `false` and fires an `invalid` event at the element.

methods.name: reportValidity
methods.description: Returns `true` if the element's `value` passes validity checks; otherwise, returns `false`, fires an `invalid` event at the element, and (if the event isn't canceled) reports the problem to the user.

methods.name: select
methods.description: Selects all the text in the text field
